reviews.author: Rinkey Mishra
reviews.review_body:
"I feel that my decision was right in sending my child to school, the progress of our child has made academically.My child has truly blossomed over the past three years academically and socially" .
Will miss u badly specially house mother.thabk you so much mam for being always.

reviews.author: Akash Jain
reviews.review_body: My Daughter Vaanya has almost completed her a year in SIS n have seen lots of good changes in her . We are quite satisfied with the school, and would suggest others too .

reviews.author: Tamal Mukherjee
reviews.review_body:
Selaqui International School in Dehradun provides an exceptional CBSE education, fostering a strong sense of community and comprehensive development. From exceptional academics to a rich cultural environment, the school cultivates a strong sense of togetherness.

We've found Selaqui International School to be the ideal CBSE school in Dehradun, where academic excellence goes hand in hand with sports, cultural activities and extracurriculars in a nurturing, family-like atmosphere and  we, as parents, feel consistently connected.

The parental-like devotion of the Principal sir, house/ hostel mothers, teachers, administration staffs and  all the faculty members is deeply appreciated.

I am and will always be  grateful to the school from the bottom of my heart for how it has helped to shape my child into a confident, considerate and responsible individual.

reviews.author: sushma Yadav
reviews.review_body: It was an apt decision to choose… Selaqui for my kids. The school provides an overall development of a child… the Environment of the school is very positive. The teachers are very friendly and cooperative towards the children. Initially it is a task to get habituated to the Boarding life… but as the children explore the opportunities…they start enjoying the Boarding life….. My experience has been very satisfying and I recommend Selaqui International School for sure…..

reviews.author: URMILA SINGH
reviews.review_body: Selaqui International School is a home away from home. The teachers take good care of the children, making their needs a priority. My children are learning and enjoying school thoroughly.

reviews.author: shakti industries
reviews.review_body: Selaqui school is really worth it. It’s one of the finest boarding school. It gives holistic approach for the growth of the child and it focuses on both studies and sports. The campus is well maintained and has all facilities.They prepare the students from all aspects.

reviews.author: Nikhil Jawahar
reviews.review_body:
Two years ago, our son joined Selaqui International School in Class IX and is now appearing for his Class X board exams.

When he joined, he was barely passing and had little interest in studies. His only goal was to pass. However, when I met him just before his exams, he told me he was aiming for 90% or more, which was a huge surprise for us. His approach and attitude towards studies have completely changed, and he has put in tremendous effort, supported by his teachers in class and hostel, along with the House Tutors.

The school provides a well-structured environment where every student is encouraged to focus on their tasks. The hostel stay is very well managed by the House Masters and their team.

There have been times when my son was unwell, and the on-campus doctor provided excellent medical care, ensuring a quick recovery.

We are incredibly grateful to the Headmaster, Mr. Rashid Sharfuddin, Pastoral Head, Mr. Ashford Lyonette, House Master, Mr. Satish Sah, the Academic Head, the Sports In-Charge, and the entire staff. A special mention goes to Mohan Ji, who takes care of the entire house. We truly appreciate their dedication and support.

reviews.author: Sonal sharma
reviews.review_body: Enrolling my son at Selaqui International School has been an ideal decision. The transition was seamless, and the supportive teachers have played a significant role in nurturing his growth. The school's strict anti-ragging policy ensures a safe and welcoming environment, allowing students to thrive. With a wide range of activities to choose from and a picturesque campus, Selaqui offers the perfect blend of academics and extracurricular opportunities.

reviews.author: Wanwilai Vittayakorn
reviews.review_body: My daughter have recently joined Selaqui International School,  Dehradun. The admission process was facilitated very well online by the admission team. Their support and step by step assistance has gained our confidence in the school and its management.
